rules_locked.highlights_scope: weekly_highlights shows ONLY events in the current week (Sun–Sat). Max 4.
rules_locked.venue_regulars: Do not change unless explicitly requested.
rules_locked.venue_specials: Retain verified future-dated events that remain relevant inside the 14–60 day horizon; remove expired items.
rules_locked.sports: metro_sports reflects broader rolling demand indicators; weekly_highlights remains current-week only.
rules_locked.friction_logic: Weather, street closures, setup impacts, and overlap zones belong in local_updates and/or decision_triggers even before the headline event starts.
rules_locked.horizon_scope: forward_look should cover roughly the next 14–60 days from updated_at.
rules_locked.expired_cleanup: Remove all past events before 2026-04-19 unless still needed for current-week context.

metro_sports: Apr–May — OKC Thunder playoff window (Paycom Center)
local_updates: Festival of the Arts road closures are already active and continue through early May.
Downtown OKC stacks playoff traffic, Festival of the Arts, and Memorial Marathon pressure inside the same late-April window.
Norman Music Festival creates a second major late-April pull zone south of OKC.
Comets home dates continue to keep Bricktown active even outside the biggest headline events.
Late-week rain and thunderstorm chances could complicate festival, marathon, and downtown pickup timing.
